items.name: glow-card
items.title: Glow Card
items.description: A card with a glowing hover effect.

items.name: github-stars
items.title: GitHub Stars
items.description: Displays a GitHub repo star count with auto-fetch, daily revalidation, compact formatting, and a tooltip.

items.name: github-stars-react
items.title: GitHub Stars (React / Vite)
items.description: GitHub star count for Vite and non-Next.js React projects. Fetches client-side with localStorage caching for 24 hours.

items.name: gradient-text-fill
items.title: Gradient Text Fill
items.description: Animated gradient fills the text itself with 3D depth. Works on any background color.

items.name: gradient-background-text
items.title: Gradient Background Text
items.description: Animated gradient background orb text with 3D engraved effect. Works on any background color.

items.name: discord-online
items.title: Discord Online (Next.js)
items.description: Shows live Discord member presence count fetched server-side with 60s revalidation. Label shown on tooltip hover. Requires Next.js App Router.

items.name: discord-online-react
items.title: Discord Online (React / Vite)
items.description: Shows live Discord member presence count fetched client-side with 60s localStorage cache. Label shown on tooltip hover.

items.name: logo-marquee
items.title: Logo Marquee
items.description: Infinite marquee logo slider with mask fade edges and hover speed control.

items.name: blurred-marquee
items.title: Blurred Marquee
items.description: Infinite marquee logo slider with mask blurred edges and hover speed control.

items.name: logo-grid
items.title: Logo Grid
items.description: Grid of client logos with plus-sign separators and highlighted rows.

items.name: github-calendar
items.title: GitHub Calendar
items.description: A Next.js/React component to display GitHub contributions in a calendar grid format.

items.name: avatar-tooltips
items.title: Avatar Tooltips
items.description: Interactive overlapping avatars that reveal animated, spring-based tooltips on hover.

items.name: 3d-button
items.title: 3D Button
items.description: A premium 3D button component with customizable dual-tone gradients, shimmer effects and depth shadows.

items.name: sliding-button
items.title: Sliding Button
items.description: A high-performance interactive button that slides an icon into view on hover with spring animations and depth shadows.

items.name: drag-button
items.title: Drag Button
items.description: An interactive draggable button requiring a left-to-right swipe to confirm actions, featuring optional success animations and spring physics.

items.name: press-button
items.title: Press Button
items.description: An industry-grade neobrutalist button with a 3D press effect.

items.name: cursor-trail
items.title: Cursor Trail
items.description: A smooth and refined shape trail effect that beautifully interpolates along your mouse cursor path.

items.name: image-trail
items.title: Image Trail
items.description: A very smooth and interactive trail of images that follows your mouse cursor with discrete step interpolation.

items.name: text-outline-glow
items.title: Text Outline Glow
items.description: A very smooth and interactive trail of images that follows your mouse cursor with discrete step interpolation.

items.name: animated-bars
items.title: Animated Bars
items.description: A dynamic background component with pulsating, gradient bars that create a fluid energy effect.

items.name: animated-layout
items.title: Animated Layout
items.description: A modern and dynamic layout component featuring fluid animations, smooth transitions, and a responsive grid system.

items.name: theme-toggler
items.title: Theme Toggler
items.description: A minimal theme toggle button with a cinematic full-screen curtain wipe animation. Supports vertical and horizontal directions.

items.name: styled-button
items.title: Styled Button
items.description: An elegant styled button with vibrant radial gradients, shadow glows, and smooth active transitions.
